Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment Entered Against Associated Insulation Of California, Inc.
Off Calendar Aug-17-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Kyle J. Clawson of SELMAN BREITMAN LLP (415-979-0400), appearing for moving party Fireman's Fund Insurance Company, the insurer of defendant Associated Insulation of California, Inc., a suspended corporation
Kimberly J. Chu of BRAYTON & PURCELL (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiffs / opposing parties Sandra Liberty, as Wrongful Death Heir, and as Successor-in-Interest to Arthur Klimack, deceased, et al.

RULING:
FIREMAN'S FUND INSURANCE COMPANY'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT ENTERED AGAINST ASSOCIATED INSULATION OF CALIFORNIA, INC.

At the Johnston (#274950) hearing the Court granted parties' request to also argue the same motions in the Lujan (#275496), Hanson (#275624), Liberty (#275871), Turner (#275910), and Harig (#276181) cases. Hearing held and tentative ruling adopted as to the Liberty case: Fireman's Fund Insurance Company's motion to set aside entry of default and default judgment is granted. Fireman's Fund is allowed to bring said motion. (See Western Heritage Ins. Co. v. Superior Court (2011) 199 Cal.App.4th 1196.) The default entered against defendant Associated Insulation of California on August 15, 2012 is set aside pursuant to the court's inherent, equitable power to set aside a default on the ground of extrinsic fraud or mistake. The default judgment entered against defendant Associated Insulation of California on January 14, 2016 is set aside pursuant to C.C.P. 473(b) as well as the court's inherent, equitable power to set aside a default on the ground of extrinsic fraud or mistake. Plaintiff's request for a continuance is denied. Order signed in open court. Judge: Garrett L. Wong, Reporter: Sandy Lee of AIKEN WELCH, CSR 971 (Tel: 510-451-1580) (503/GLW)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment Entered Against Associated Insulation Of California, Inc.
Off Calendar Jul-28-2016 Continued To Aug-17-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 503
MINI MINUTES:
Fireman's Fund Insurance Company's motion to set aside default and default judgment entered against Associated Insulation of California, Inc. is continued on the court's own motion to August 17, 2016. Judge: Garrett L. Wong, Matter not reported (503/GLW)

Application For Entry Of Default Judgment Against Defendant Associated Insulation Of California
Off Calendar Jan-14-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Lior A. Brinn, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, Sandra Liberty, as wrongful Death Heir, and as Successor - in Interest to Arthur Klimack, deceased.
Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.

No appearance by defaulted defendant Associated Insulation of California.
Default of Defendant has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant as follows:
IT IS ORDERED, ADJUDGED AND DECREED that the plaintiffs shall recover damages from defendant Associated Insulation of California, in the amount of:

$2,038.49.00 in Economic Damages,
$250,000.00 in Non-Economic Damages,
Total Judgment of $252,038.49.

The Clerk is ordered to enter the judgment.
Judgment signed in open court.
